outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Trump threatens to shoot boats laying mines as tension escalates in Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: CNN leads with Trump ordering Navy to 'shoot and kill' Iranian mine-layers in Hormuz. Also covers USS George H.W. Bush as 3rd US carrier, Pope Leo XIV call for peace, and Lebanon-Israel talks.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Lebanon and Israel resume rare direct talks as Israel demolishes homes in occupied south
outlets.summary: WaPo leads with Lebanon-Israel Washington talks and Israeli home demolitions in occupied southern Lebanon. Beit Lif 'almost entirely flattened.' Iran seizes ships, opinion piece: both sides want peace but won't act like it.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump 'clock is ticking' for Iran as third aircraft carrier arrives — Navy Secretary ousted in Pentagon shakeup
outlets.summary: Fox leads with Trump's Truth Social threats on Iran leadership, USS George H.W. Bush arriving as 3rd US carrier, and Hegseth removing Navy Sec Phelan. Also: Senate rejects 5th war powers resolution 46-51.

outlets.name: RedState
outlets.headline: Iran War pushes gas past $4 — US still paying far less than most countries
outlets.summary: Coverage framing US gas prices as painful but noting Americans pay less than European allies hit harder by the Hormuz blockade.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: US to 'shoot and kill' Iranian boats laying mines in Hormuz, Trump says
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera leads with Trump's 'shoot and kill' order, Pentagon 6-month mine-clearance estimate, and Houthi threat to close Bab el-Mandeb. Also: Iran air defenses engaged 'hostile targets' over Tehran.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Trump extends U.S. ceasefire with Iran at Pakistan's request
outlets.summary: NPR reports on Trump's indefinite ceasefire extension made at the request of Pakistan's PM Sharif and Army Chief Munir.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Trump says 'clock is ticking' for Iran as third US aircraft carrier arrives in Mideast
outlets.summary: Times of Israel liveblog covers USS George H.W. Bush arrival, Hezbollah drone strike on al-Bayada IDF site, Iran air defenses engaging over Tehran, and IDF killing 25 Hezbollah operatives since ceasefire.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: US-Iran ceasefire extended until Iranian officials submit 'unified proposal'
outlets.summary: JPost covers Trump's indefinite ceasefire extension and its implications for Israeli military planning.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iran tightens Strait of Hormuz control as Trump orders Navy to 'shoot and kill' mine-layers
outlets.summary: Press TV frames Iran as reinforcing sovereign deterrence in Hormuz. Araghchi meets South Korean envoy; tells Italy's FM that Hormuz instability 'stems directly from US lawlessness.' Iran judiciary denies Trump's 8-women execution claim.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: Iran rejects pressure as US maritime terrorism casts ominous cloud over diplomacy
outlets.summary: Coverage of Tifani seizure as 'maritime terrorism' and Araghchi's condemnation of US blockade as 'act of war' and ceasefire violation.
